title: I Release Wealth as Just Mine and Allow Stewardship
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the ownership-only view of wealth and opening to a purposeful steward identity
excerpt: A short energy statement from the Day 76 theme of a 12-week money programme. The release names the view of wealth as something personal, accumulated, spent. The allow names the broader identity of someone who holds and directs money toward lasting good for others.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 76 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when the idea of being a wealth steward feels unfamiliar, presumptuous, or too much, and you want to settle into it as a natural next identity.

content.text: A short energy statement from the Day 76 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 76 theme: celebrating the identity of wealth steward. The release names the narrower view of wealth as purely personal property. The allow names the expansive identity of someone who holds and directs money toward lasting good.
I am ready to release every belief that wealth is simply mine to own and spend, with no wider purpose or responsibility attached. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

I am ready to align with and allow the joyful, purposeful identity of someone who holds, guides, and directs wealth for the lasting good of my family, community, and future generations. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 76 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
